decisions.description:
Initiate sicm_modernized; modernize SICM 1e/2e + FDG; extend to
GR (geodesics in fixed backgrounds) and QM (Schrödinger + path
integral + phase-space). Working package name pinned; final
artifact title deferred.
decisions.name: D001
decisions.title: Project scope and working name

decisions.description:
Apply the iomoments/fireasm SysE-discipline pattern (ontology
DAG, audit, two-tier gates, immutable DECISIONS.md). Re-derived,
not forked from python_agent.
decisions.name: D002
decisions.title: CD-first deliverable mode; methodology re-derived from iomoments + fireasm

decisions.description:
Racket CS symbolic top; Typed Racket numerical mid; Python +
JAX as test oracle and prototyping; CUDA C for production GPU.
Hybrid (option C) JAX-as-oracle posture.
decisions.name: D003
decisions.title: Language stack: Racket CS + Python + JAX + CUDA C

decisions.description:
GPU-tagged tests run pre-push only; CI skips them. GitHub Pro
does not include GPU runners in its free quota.
decisions.name: D004
decisions.title: GPU testing policy: local-only, never in CI

invariants.description:
For a time-independent Hamiltonian, the value H(q(t), p(t)) is
conserved along the flow. Symplectic integrators conserve a
modified Hamiltonian exactly and the true H to bounded drift
over exponentially long times — both forms are valuable as
verification cases.
invariants.name: energy_conservation

invariants.description:
The symplectic 2-form omega = dq wedge dp on phase space.
Preserved by the Hamiltonian flow; symplectic integrators
preserve a discrete analogue. The defining structure that makes
a numerical method 'symplectic' rather than merely accurate.
invariants.name: symplectic_2_form

mathematical_objects.description:
The action functional S = integral of L dt evaluated along a
path q(t). The single most important object in this project:
classical mechanics stationarizes it, path-integral QM sums
over it, GR stationarizes it on a spacetime manifold, field
theory generalizes it to spacetime integrals. PROJECT_NOTES.md
§10 names this the architectural keystone of the whole arc.
mathematical_objects.name: action

mathematical_objects.description:
The Lagrangian function L(q, qdot, t) on the tangent bundle of
configuration space. Integrand of the action. Subject of the
Euler-Lagrange variational principle.
mathematical_objects.name: lagrangian

mathematical_objects.description:
The Hamiltonian function H(q, p, t) on the cotangent bundle.
Legendre-transform image of the Lagrangian. Generates the
symplectic Hamiltonian flow on phase space.
mathematical_objects.name: hamiltonian

mathematical_relations.description:
The Euler-Lagrange equations: stationary-action condition delta
S = 0 yields d/dt(dL/dqdot) - dL/dq = 0, i.e., the equations of
motion in Lagrangian form.
mathematical_relations.name: euler_lagrange

mathematical_relations.description:
The Legendre transform L -> H taking Lagrangian to Hamiltonian
via p := dL/dqdot and H(q, p, t) := p qdot - L(q, qdot, t).
Bridges the tangent-bundle and cotangent-bundle pictures of
classical mechanics.
mathematical_relations.name: legendre_transform
